mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS ( CODE_ID, FIGMA_URL, DOMAIN, BRAND, COMPONENT_NAME, TITLE, CATEGORY, DESCRIPTION, REQUIREMENTS, SYSTEM_PROMPT, USER_PROMPT, REACT_CODE, FAIL_REASON, STATUS, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DTIME, REF_CODE_ID, ROOT_CODE_ID ) VALUES ( #{e.codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.figmaUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.domain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.componentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.requirements,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{e.systemPrompt,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{e.userPrompt,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{e.reactCode,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{e.failReason,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{e.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.createUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.createDtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.refCodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.rootCodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.sql: CODE_ID AS codeId, FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, TITLE AS title, BRAND AS brand, DOMAIN AS domain, CATEGORY AS category, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, DESCRIPTION AS description, REQUIREMENTS AS requirements, REACT_CODE AS reactCode, FAIL_REASON AS failReason, STATUS AS status, CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, CREATE_DTIME AS createDtime, APPROVAL_USER_ID AS approvalUserId, APPROVAL_DTIME AS approvalDtime, REF_CODE_ID AS refCodeId, ROOT_CODE_ID AS rootCodeId
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT CODE_ID AS codeId, FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, TITLE AS title, BRAND AS brand, DOMAIN AS domain, CATEGORY AS category, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, STATUS AS status, CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, CREATE_DTIME AS createDtime, APPROVAL_USER_ID AS approvalUserId, APPROVAL_DTIME AS approvalDtime FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS
ORDER BY CREATE_DTIME DESC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{req.endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{req.offset}

SELECT CODE_ID AS codeId, FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, TITLE AS title, BRAND AS brand, DOMAIN AS domain, CATEGORY AS category, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, STATUS AS status, CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, CREATE_DTIME AS createDtime, APPROVAL_USER_ID AS approvalUserId, APPROVAL_DTIME AS approvalDtime FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS
ORDER BY CREATE_DTIME DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT CODE_ID AS codeId, TITLE AS title, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, STATUS AS status, CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, CREATE_DTIME AS createDtime FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS WHERE STATUS = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' ORDER BY CREATE_DTIME ASC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS WHERE STATUS = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT CODE_ID AS codeId, TITLE AS title, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, FIGMA_URL AS figmaUrl, STATUS AS status, CREATE_USER_ID AS createUserId, CREATE_DTIME AS createDtime, APPROVAL_USER_ID AS approvalUserId, APPROVAL_DTIME AS approvalDtime FROM FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS
ORDER BY APPROVAL_DTIME DESC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
mapper.update:
UPDATE FWK_REACT_CODE_HIS SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_USER_ID = #{approvalUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVAL_DTIME = #{approvalDtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FAIL_REASON = #{failReason,jdbcType=CLOB} WHERE CODE_ID = #{codeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
